# Vellvii

Vellvii is a US-based luxury intimate wellness brand creating discreet, refined products for modern couples. The collection includes portable and home-focused storage pieces, DOX-compatible products, and a design-led Pleasure Collection built around privacy, elegance, and thoughtful use.

## Current product lineup
- Vellvii DOX - the larger, sturdier storage and docking hub of the Vellvii Pleasure Collection. Faux leather exterior with rose gold accents, velvet-lined interior with a movable velvet-lined tray for smaller pieces, biometric fingerprint lock (up to 10 fingerprints), USB-C input on the exterior powering 3 internal USB-A ports for charging toys inside.
- Vellvii Lux - a portable fingerprint-lock storage case the size of a refined toiletries bag. Genuine leather exterior, velvet-lined interior, biometric lock, USB-C input on the exterior powering 2 internal USB-A ports. Lux is a separate portable storage product and is not part of the DOX docking system.
- Vellvii G-Vibe - compatible with the VDS suction mount that sits atop the DOX.
- Vellvii Evolve - compatible with the VDS suction mount that sits atop the DOX.
- Vellvii Pulse - compatible with the VDS suction mount that sits atop the DOX.

## DOX docking system
- The VDS and DDS are suction-base mounting stations that sit atop the DOX (not internal shaped inserts), turning the DOX itself into a refined stand for compatible suction-base pieces.
- VDS (Vellvii Docking Station) - top-mounted suction station for current Vellvii products with suction bases (G-Vibe, Evolve, Pulse).
- DDS (Dildo Docking Station) - round top-mounted suction station for compatible suction-base products up to 90mm (approximately 3.5 inches) in diameter.

## Positioning
Premium wellness, design-led, quiet luxury. Discreet, refined, and conversion-focused. App-connected functionality is not currently available and should not be referenced as a live feature.
